methods.name: initializeStream
methods.desc: Initialize a new stream with hardcoded payment recipient

methods.name: startStreaming
methods.desc: Start streaming session - user deposits for 10-second interval

methods.name: continueStreaming
methods.desc: Continue streaming - deposit for next 10-second interval

methods.name: stopStreaming
methods.desc: Stop streaming and refund any remaining held amount

methods.name: updatePaymentRecipient
methods.desc: Update payment recipient (only owner can call)

methods.name: emergencyStop
methods.desc: Emergency stop - only stream owner can call

sourceInfo.errorMessage: can only call when not creating
